title: Savory Venezuelan Ciabatta Sandwich
description: A pescatarian-friendly meal-prep dish featuring crispy ciabatta bread served with a savory filling using sous-vide cooking method.
instructions: Preheat your sous-vide machine to 140°F for the filling.
Slice the ciabatta bread and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Place the sous-vide portion inside the preheated sous-vide bag and cook for about 1 hour, maintaining at 140°F until fully cooked.
When the ciabatta is ready, remove from sous-vide machine and let cool slightly.
On each slice of cooled ciabatta, spread a thin layer of avocado mayo sauce evenly across it.
Add the prepared Sous-vide Poblano and Pepper Filling to each sandwich slice.
Fold the ciabatta over the filling to encase everything inside.
